Home Make a Submission?

Barby's Shrimp Salads

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 1 lb Elbow Macaroni
  • 2 cans Med. Shrimp, drained
  • Miracle Whip - lots
  • chopped onion
  • chopped celery
  • 1 can peas, drained
  • Lawrey’s Seasoning - lots
  • Pepper - lots

Directions

Mix all together. BTW - doubling this recipe equals a “Memorial Day” sized salad.
